sources.title: 4 Ways To Turn Fixed Ops Challenges Into Financial Opportunities | CDK Global
sources.excerpt: Many dealerships are shocked to discover as many as [16% of calls](https://www.cdkglobal.com/insights/4-ways-turn-fixed-ops-challenges-financial-opportunities#) are never answered, according to mobile advertising company Marchex.

sources.title: Subscription Services Automotive Industry Trends 2025 | BDC Guide | Strolid
sources.excerpt: Most service marketing delivers poor returns: **Direct Mail Campaigns:** Typically cost $1-2 per piece with 0.5-2% response rates, resulting in $50-200 cost per appointment.
